name: The Last Wright: Building the Final Home Design of America's Greatest Architect
original_name: The Last Wright: Building the Final Home Design of America's Greatest Architect
overview: Modern-day building codes and materials challenge mother and daughter team, Sarah and Debbie Dykstra, as they take on the challenge of constructing a house from the last set of drawings completed by Frank Lloyd Wright before his death in 1959.

trailers.title: The Last Wright Building the Final Home Design of America's Greatest Architect | Magnolia Network
